faqs.a: Yes, we are fully registered members of the British Acupuncture Council.
We offer treatments for a wide range of conditions including pain management, stress relief and mental health support.

faqs.q: Is your practice clean needle certified?
faqs.a: Absolutely. We adhere to the highest standards with our Clean Needle Technique certification.

faqs.q: How do I book an appointment?
faqs.a: You can call us or use our online booking form on this website.
